regulation_name: Guidelines on Advertisement of Health Supplements
citation: Guidelines on Advertisement of Health Supplements — Clause 5
summary: Health supplement ads are restricted to general health maintenance claims and must not imply medicinal effects.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Vitamin, herbal, or nutritional health benefit claims. ACTION: WARN — verify against permitted claim list. CHECK: Product notification status and ingredient claims. ESCALATE IF: Disease treatment or pharmacological effect implied.
